prompt: Approved turn pressure counter node: choose response.
why_v1: Counter-pressure branch is encoded as raise_to here.
feedback_acceptable_v1: Acceptable. Calling remains legal, but raising back now is the stronger counter because it applies pressure instead of just absorbing it.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Raise is the approved pressure counter here.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. This turn pressure spot improves by raising back now; calling just absorbs pressure without pushing weaker continues or fold equity.
